ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meteorological station where the data was collected */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "relative_humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "station_pressure" REAL /* Station pressure in kilopascals */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Percentage of sky covered by clouds */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Text description of the weather condition */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensors used to collect the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Identifier for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_records_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES meteorological_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorological_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meteorological station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the meteorological station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the meteorological station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the station */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meteorological station */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the temperature record */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Identifier for the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the temperature data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES meteorological_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_data" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meteorological station */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the humidity record */,
  "min_humidity" INTEGER /* Minimum relative humidity percentage */,
  "max_humidity" INTEGER /* Maximum relative humidity percentage */,
  "avg_humidity" INTEGER /* Average relative humidity percentage */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Identifier for the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the humidity data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES meteorological_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_data" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meteorological station */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the wind record */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "gust_speed" REAL /* Maximum gust speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Identifier for the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the wind data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES meteorological_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visibility_data" (
  "visibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visibility record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meteorological station */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the visibility record */,
  "min_visibility" REAL /* Minimum visibility in kilometers */,
  "max_visibility" REAL /* Maximum visibility in kilometers */,
  "avg_visibility" REAL /* Average visibility in kilometers */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Identifier for the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the visibility data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visibility_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES meteorological_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_data" (
  "pressure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meteorological station */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the pressure record */,
  "min_pressure" REAL /* Minimum station pressure in kilopascals */,
  "max_pressure" REAL /* Maximum station pressure in kilopascals */,
  "avg_pressure" REAL /* Average station pressure in kilopascals */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Identifier for the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the pressure data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pressure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES meteorological_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather record */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the weather record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was integrated into the WIS */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint for accessing the external data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data provided by the source */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meteorological station */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the forecast */,
  "predicted_temp" REAL /* Predicted temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "predicted_humidity" INTEGER /* Predicted relative humidity percentage */,
  "predicted_wind_speed" REAL /* Predicted wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "predicted_visibility" REAL /* Predicted visibility in kilometers */,
  "predicted_pressure" REAL /* Predicted station pressure in kilopascals */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Name of the model used to generate the forecast */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Identifier for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES meteorological_stations ("station_id")
)
